classes.name: DogeRMSNorm
classes.rationale: inherits LlamaRMSNorm verbatim; standard llama-family RMSNorm

classes.name: DogeAttention
classes.rationale: Doge dynamic-mask attention (DMA): standard q/k/v + q_norm/k_norm + apply_rotary, but ALSO has dt_proj, learnable A param, and prepare_dynamic_mask producing topk-window sparse attention bias. Forward routes through ALL_ATTENTION_FUNCTIONS (eager/flex). No kb-nano file implements DMA; closest building blocks are L1/linear, L1/rms_norm, L1/rotary_emb but the dynamic-mask path is unique. Mark as decompose; no direct kernel mapping.

classes.name: DogeMLP
classes.rationale: inherits LlamaMLP unchanged; SwiGLU pattern with silu_and_mul

classes.name: DogeCDMoE
classes.rationale: Cross-Domain MoE: shared SwiGLU expert + product-key retrieval over Embedding-based experts (down_embed/up_embed). No kb-nano kernel implements product-key MoE; uses bare gate_proj/up_proj/down_proj + nn.Embedding lookups + matmul. Mark as decompose.

classes.name: DogeDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: input_layernorm + self_attn + dropout + per-channel input_residual + post_attention_layernorm + mlp/CDMoE + dropout + per-channel post_attention_residual; learnable per-channel residual scaling is unique

classes.name: DonutSwinEmbeddings
classes.rationale: wiring: DonutSwinPatchEmbeddings + optional absolute pos embedding + LayerNorm + Dropout

classes.name: DonutSwinPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection; closest L1 building block

classes.name: DonutSwinPatchMerging
classes.rationale: concat-2x2 + Linear(4*dim->2*dim) + LayerNorm. SwinV2 kb-nano variant has SwinV2PatchMerging but with different dim signature; the compute pattern matches but Donut is Swin-v1 (norm AFTER concat, before linear). Decompose from L1/linear + L1/layer_norm.

classes.name: DonutSwinSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Window-based MHA with relative position bias TABLE (additive bias indexed by relative_position_index) + learnable bias. kb-nano L2/swinv2_window_attention is COSINE attention with continuous-position-bias MLP -- DIFFERENT (Swin v2 vs Swin v1). No matching kb-nano kernel; decompose from L1/linear + L1/softmax + manual matmul.

classes.name: DonutSwinSelfOutput
classes.rationale: wiring: Linear + Dropout (residual is in DonutSwinLayer)

classes.name: DonutSwinIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT2FN[hidden_act]. composes from L1/linear + L1/gelu (or whatever activation).

classes.name: DonutSwinLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: layernorm_before -> attention -> residual -> layernorm_after -> intermediate -> output -> residual; window partition/reverse + shifted-window cyclic shift

classes.name: Dots1Attention
classes.rationale: inherits Qwen3Attention; q_norm/k_norm + RoPE + GQA. L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention supports qk_norm=True for the Qwen3 path.

classes.name: Dots1MLP
classes.rationale: inherits DeepseekV3MLP which is the standard SwiGLU pattern (gate/up/down)

classes.name: Dots1TopkRouter
classes.rationale: inherits DeepseekV3 grouped sigmoid+top-k routing with bias

classes.name: Dots1MoE
classes.rationale: inherits DeepseekV3MoE: grouped routing + shared expert + routed experts

classes.name: Dots1DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: norm + attention + residual + norm + (mlp or moe) + residual

classes.name: Dots1Model
classes.rationale: wiring: embed + decoder layers + final norm

classes.name: DPRSpanPredictor
classes.rationale: wiring: DPREncoder + qa_outputs Linear + qa_classifier Linear

classes.name: DPTViTHybridEmbeddings
classes.rationale: wiring: backbone + Conv2d projection + cls_token + position_embeddings

classes.name: DPTViTPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection (closest L1 building block); composes

classes.name: DPTSelfAttention
classes.rationale: ViT-style separate q/k/v Linear + ALL_ATTENTION_FUNCTIONS dispatch (non-causal). kb-nano L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention has SAME pattern (separate q/k/v + DenseAttention/FlashAttnVarlen) but is BERT-targeted with bias=True; DPTSelfAttention uses config.qkv_bias and is post-norm-style ViT. Closest match is encoder_attention.py-pattern (decompose from L1/linear + L1/sdpa).

classes.name: DPTViTIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT2FN; ViT MLP first half

classes.name: DPTViTLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre-norm ViT block (LN -> attention -> residual -> LN -> intermediate -> output -> residual)

classes.name: DPTReassembleStage
classes.rationale: DPT-specific: token-to-spatial reassemble (readout fusion + 1x1 conv project + interpolation/transpose-conv resize)

classes.name: DPTFeatureFusionLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: fuse hidden_states_1 + DPTPreActResidualLayer; bilinear upsample

classes.name: DPTModel
classes.rationale: wiring: embeddings + encoder + LayerNorm + optional pooler

classes.name: DPTDepthEstimationHead
classes.rationale: Conv2d + bilinear interp + Conv2d + ReLU + Conv2d + ReLU

classes.name: DPTForSemanticSegmentation
classes.rationale: wiring: DPTModel + DPTNeck + DPTSemanticSegmentationHead + auxiliary head

classes.name: EdgeTamLayerNorm
classes.rationale: inherits Sam2LayerNorm (channel-first 2D LayerNorm); composes via L1/layer_norm.py

classes.name: EdgeTamAttention
classes.rationale: Sam2 attention pattern: separate q/k/v Linear with downsample + ALL_ATTENTION_FUNCTIONS dispatch (sdpa). No kb-nano sam2 file; closest is sam3_cross_attention.py pattern (Q/K/V + DenseAttention) but for sam3. Mark as decompose from L1/linear + L1/sdpa.

classes.name: EdgeTamTwoWayAttentionBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: self_attn + cross_attn (token->image) + mlp + cross_attn (image->token) with LayerNorms

classes.name: EdgeTamFeedForward
classes.rationale: Sam2FeedForward: ModuleList of Linear + ReLU layers (multi-layer MLP with skip)

classes.name: EdgeTamModel
classes.rationale: wiring: vision encoder + prompt encoder + mask decoder; memory streams elided

classes.name: EdgeTamVideoMemoryFuserCXBlock
classes.rationale: ConvNeXt-style block (DwConv + LN + pwconv + GELU + pwconv + gamma + drop_path); closest analog is L2/convnextv2_block.py but Sam2 variant differs

classes.name: EdgeTamVideoAttention
classes.rationale: Sam2-style attention with downsample; decompose from L1

classes.name: EdgeTamVideoRoPESelfAttention
classes.rationale: Self-attention with 2D rotary position encoding (apply_rotary_pos_emb_2d_self_attn). No kb-nano kernel implements this 2D rotary variant for SAM2 memory attention. Decompose from L1/linear + custom 2D rope.

classes.name: EdgeTamVideoRoPECrossAttention
classes.rationale: Cross-attention with 2D rotary; supports rope_k_repeat and num_k_exclude_rope. Decompose.

classes.name: EdgeTamVideoPositionEmbeddingSine
classes.rationale: sinusoidal 2D position encoding; pure tensor ops, composes

classes.name: EdgeTamVideoMemoryAttentionLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: layer_norm1 -> RoPESelfAttention -> dropout -> layer_norm2 -> RoPECrossAttention -> dropout -> layer_norm3 -> mlp -> dropout

classes.name: EdgeTamVideoMemoryAttention
classes.rationale: wiring: ModuleList[MemoryAttentionLayer] + final LayerNorm + 2 rotary embeddings (q and k)

classes.name: EdgeTamVideoPerceiverAttention
classes.rationale: Standard MHA with separate q/k/v + ALL_ATTENTION_FUNCTIONS dispatch + optional positional_encoding addition

classes.name: EdgeTamVideoPerceiverEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: cross_attention + mlp + self_attention + self_mlp; perceiver-style block

classes.name: EdgeTamVideoModel
classes.rationale: wiring: vision encoder + prompt encoder + memory + perceiver + mask decoder

classes.name: EfficientLoFTRRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: 2D RoPE for spatial features; custom (not standard rotary_emb)

classes.name: EfficientLoFTRConvNormLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BatchNorm2d + ACT2FN; composes from L1/conv2d + L1/batch_norm2d

classes.name: EfficientLoFTRRepVGGBlock
classes.rationale: RepVGG block (3x3 conv + 1x1 conv + identity branch). kb-nano has rtdetrv2_repvgg_block.py for RT-DETR but EfficientLoFTR variant differs in fusion. Decompose.

classes.name: EfficientLoFTRAggregationLayer
classes.rationale: Spatial feature aggregation via conv pooling; custom

classes.name: EfficientLoFTRAttention
classes.rationale: MHA with GQA (separate q/k/v) + 2D RoPE + ALL_ATTENTION_FUNCTIONS dispatch; non-causal. Decompose from L1/linear + L1/sdpa.

classes.name: EfficientLoFTRMLP
classes.rationale: Linear(2*hidden->intermediate) + ACT2FN + Linear(intermediate->hidden) + LayerNorm; non-standard input dim

classes.name: EfficientLoFTRAggregatedAttention
classes.rationale: wiring: aggregation + attention + mlp + bilinear upsample + concat-skip

classes.name: EfficientLoFTRLocalFeatureTransformerLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: self_attention + cross_attention (with the upstream bug retained)

classes.name: EfficientNetEmbeddings
classes.rationale: ZeroPad2d + Conv2d(stride=2) + BatchNorm2d + ACT2FN; stem block. Decompose from L1/conv2d + L1/batch_norm2d.

classes.name: EfficientNetDepthwiseConv2d
classes.rationale: depthwise Conv2d (groups=in_channels); same kernel as L1/conv2d.py used with groups param

classes.name: EfficientNetExpansionLayer
classes.rationale: 1x1 Conv2d + BatchNorm2d + ACT2FN; expansion phase. Closest L2 analog L2/efficientnetv2_inverted_residual.py uses BatchNormAct2d (fused). Mark decompose.

classes.name: EfficientNetSqueezeExciteLayer
classes.rationale: AdaptiveAvgPool2d + Conv1x1 + ACT2FN + Conv1x1 + Sigmoid + scale. L2/efficientnetv2_squeeze_excite.py implements the same SE pattern (GlobalAvgPool + reduce conv + SiLU + expand conv + Sigmoid). EfficientNet (v1) hidden_act varies by config (typically silu); SE block is structurally identical.

classes.name: EfficientNetFinalBlockLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d projection + BatchNorm2d + Dropout + skip add

classes.name: EfficientNetBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: optional expansion + depthwise + SE + projection. Closest L2 analog L2/efficientnetv2_inverted_residual.py is EfficientNetV2 inverted residual (uses BatchNormAct2d fusion); EfficientNet v1 uses non-fused BN+act so structurally similar but not byte-identical.

classes.name: EfficientNetEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: ModuleList[EfficientNetBlock] + top conv + bn + activation

classes.name: ElectraEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word + position + token_type embeddings + LayerNorm + Dropout. Note: ElectraEmbeddings uses embedding_size (not hidden_size) so weight shapes differ when embedding_size != hidden_size, but the compute pattern matches L2/bert_embeddings.py:BertEmbeddings (which uses EncoderEmbeddingsBase).

classes.name: ElectraSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT self-attention copy: separate q/k/v Linear (with bias) + ALL_ATTENTION_FUNCTIONS dispatch (eager: matmul/softmax/matmul). L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention has same separate q/k/v + DenseAttention/FlashAttnVarlen pattern.

classes.name: ElectraCrossAttention
classes.rationale: BertCrossAttention: separate q (from hidden_states) and k/v (from encoder_hidden_states) with Linear projections and same SDPA dispatch. No dedicated kb-nano cross-attention encoder file; closest is encoder_attention.py pattern (same Q/K/V layout, DenseAttention).

classes.name: ElectraSelfOutput
classes.rationale: wiring: Linear + Dropout + residual + LayerNorm (post-norm BERT). Component of EncoderOutput pattern.

classes.name: ElectraAttention
classes.rationale: wiring class around ElectraSelfAttention or ElectraCrossAttention + ElectraSelfOutput

classes.name: ElectraIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT2FN. Same as L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate (Linear + GELU); activation is config-driven but BERT default is GELU.

classes.name: ElectraOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout + residual + LayerNorm. Same as L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput.

classes.name: ElectraLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: attention + optional crossattention + intermediate + output (BERT-style post-norm block)

classes.name: ElectraModel
classes.rationale: wiring: embeddings + optional embeddings_project Linear + encoder

classes.name: ElectraSequenceSummary
classes.rationale: Linear + activation + Dropout pool over sequence

classes.name: Emu3DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: input_layernorm -> self_attn -> dropout -> residual -> post_attention_layernorm -> mlp -> dropout -> residual. Adds explicit dropout after attention/MLP (unique to Emu3).

classes.name: Emu3VQVAEVectorQuantizer
classes.rationale: Embedding-based VQ codebook with argmin distance search; pure tensor ops

classes.name: Emu3VQVAESpatialNorm
classes.rationale: GroupNorm + 1x1 Conv2d gating modulated by quant states

classes.name: Emu3VQVAEResnetBlock
classes.rationale: GroupNorm or SpatialNorm + sigmoid-gated + Conv2d x2 + skip

classes.name: Emu3VQVAEAttentionBlock
classes.rationale: inherits SiglipAttention; standard MHA with separate q/k/v + DenseAttention. L2/siglip_attention.py matches.

classes.name: Emu3VQVAEDownBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: ModuleList of resnet blocks + downsample

classes.name: Emu3VQVAEUpBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: ModuleList of resnet blocks + upsample

classes.name: Emu3VQVAEEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: VQVAE encoder (down blocks + middle + final norm/conv)

classes.name: EncodecConv1d
classes.rationale: Conv1d with weight_norm/time_group_norm + asymmetric/causal padding wrapper

classes.name: EncodecConvTranspose1d
classes.rationale: ConvTranspose1d with weight_norm and trim padding

classes.name: EncodecLSTM
classes.rationale: nn.LSTM wrapper with permute layout + skip connection

classes.name: EncodecEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: SEANet encoder (initial conv + downsample stages with resnet blocks + LSTM + final conv)

classes.name: EncodecDecoder
classes.rationale: wiring: SEANet decoder (initial conv + LSTM + upsample stages with resnet blocks + final conv)

classes.name: EncodecEuclideanCodebook
classes.rationale: Euclidean-distance codebook lookup (nn.functional.embedding); pure tensor ops

classes.name: EncoderDecoderModel
classes.rationale: Generic wrapper composing any encoder + any decoder model loaded via AutoModel; no own kernel

classes.name: EomtLoss
classes.rationale: loss class (CE + dice + mask), not a compute kernel

classes.name: EomtEmbeddings
classes.rationale: wiring: cls_token + register_tokens + patch_embed + position_embeddings + Dropout

classes.name: EomtAttention
classes.rationale: inherits SiglipAttention; standard separate q/k/v + DenseAttention non-causal

classes.name: EomtLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: norm1 -> attention -> layer_scale1 -> drop_path -> residual -> norm2 -> mlp -> layer_scale2 -> drop_path -> residual

classes.name: EomtScaleLayer
classes.rationale: ConvTranspose2d + ACT2FN + depthwise Conv2d + EomtLayerNorm2d (upscale block)

classes.name: EomtMaskHead
classes.rationale: fc1 + ACT2FN + fc2 + ACT2FN + fc3 (3-layer MLP)

classes.name: EomtDinov3Attention
classes.rationale: DINOv3 ViT attention with RoPE; uses fused-QKV style. kb-nano L1/dinov3_rope.py provides the RoPE op but no L2 dinov3 attention wrapper exists; closest is L2/vit_encoder_attention.py (fused QKV, non-causal) + L1/dinov3_rope.py. Mark decompose.

classes.name: EomtDinov3Layer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre-norm ViT block with layer-scale and gated-MLP option

classes.name: EomtDinov3RotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: DINOv3 2D RoPE; L1/dinov3_rope.py is the kb-nano kernel

classes.name: EomtDinov3ForUniversalSegmentation
classes.rationale: wiring: DINOv3 ViT encoder + EomtScaleBlock + EomtMaskHead

classes.name: ErnieEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BertEmbeddings + optional task_type_embeddings (ERNIE-specific). Closest: L2/bert_embeddings.py:BertEmbeddings (does not include task_type_id; would need extension).

classes.name: ErnieSelfAttention
classes.rationale: inherits BertSelfAttention verbatim; separate q/k/v + ALL_ATTENTION_FUNCTIONS dispatch. Maps to encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention.

classes.name: ErnieCrossAttention
classes.rationale: inherits BertCrossAttention; same Q/K/V layout but K/V from encoder_hidden_states. No dedicated cross-attention encoder kernel; closest is encoder_attention.py.

classes.name: ErnieLMPredictionHead
classes.rationale: wiring: transform Linear + LayerNorm + decoder Linear

classes.name: Ernie4_5RotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Olmo-style RoPE + GLM-style apply_rotary_pos_emb (interleave-then-repeat). The RotaryEmbedding inv_freq computation matches L1/rotary_emb.py; the apply_rotary uses GLM-style interleave (cos/sin from first half repeat-interleaved by 2). Closest standard is L1/rotary_emb.py with caveat: the apply step diverges from llama-style rotate_half.

classes.name: Ernie4_5MLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU MLP with optional bias on gate/up/down (config.use_bias). L2/llama_mlp.py uses MergedColumnParallelLinear which supports bias via quant_config; functionally equivalent.

classes.name: Ernie4_5Attention
classes.rationale: LlamaAttention with optional bias on q/k/v/o (config.use_bias) and GLM-style apply_rotary. L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention supports bias=True.

classes.name: Ernie4_5_MoeMLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU MLP with optional bias on gate/up/down

classes.name: Ernie4_5_MoeAttention
classes.rationale: LlamaAttention with optional bias and GLM-style RoPE apply

classes.name: Ernie4_5_MoeStatics
classes.rationale: stores e_score_correction_bias parameter; forward adds bias to gate logits (used by router)

classes.name: Ernie4_5_MoeExperts
classes.rationale: inherits MixtralExperts -- fused-MoE expert kernel (gate_up_proj + down_proj). L2/mixtral_moe.py wraps the MixtralMoE; expert weights match (w13 + w2). Note: Ernie's full block (with bias correction + shared experts) is closer to L2/shared_expert_moe.py pattern, but the bare Ernie4_5_MoeExperts class is the MixtralExperts kernel.

classes.name: Ernie4_5_MoeTopKRouter
classes.rationale: linear router + softmax + topk-with-correction-bias + normalize. Routing pattern (correction_bias + softmax + renormalize) matches L2/shared_expert_moe.py routing path but kb-nano implementation uses GroupedTopK; closest single-op match is L1/topk_softmax.py.

classes.name: Ernie4_5_MoeSparseMoeBlock
classes.rationale: MoE block: TopKRouter + Experts + optional shared_experts (LlamaMLP-style). L2/shared_expert_moe.py:SharedExpertMoE supports correction_bias routing + shared expert + routed experts; closest match (caveat: kb-nano uses sigmoid+correction routing, Ernie uses softmax+correction).

classes.name: Ernie4_5_MoeDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: input_layernorm + self_attn + residual + post_attention_layernorm + (mlp or moe) + residual

classes.name: Ernie4_5_MoeModel
classes.rationale: wiring: embed + decoder layers + final norm

classes.name: Ernie4_5_VLMoeTextRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Multimodal RoPE (3D temporal/H/W mrope_section); custom recomposition_to_3d. kb-nano L1/mrope.py is the multimodal rotary kernel.

classes.name: Ernie4_5_VLMoeTextAttention
classes.rationale: inherits Ernie4_5_MoeAttention -> LlamaAttention; GLM-style M-RoPE apply

classes.name: Ernie4_5_VLMoeMoeBlock
classes.rationale: Modality-isolated MoE: text_moe + vision_moe + optional shared_experts; routes by moe_mm_token_type_ids. UNIQUE — no kb-nano file matches the modality-isolated pattern.

classes.name: Ernie4_5_VLMoeDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: norm + attention + residual + norm + (mlp or modality MoE block) + residual

classes.name: Ernie4_5_VLMoeVisionAttention
classes.rationale: Qwen2.5-VL vision attention pattern: fused QKV + 2D vision RoPE + flash_attn_varlen with cu_seqlens. L2/vision_attention.py:VisionAttention matches.

classes.name: Ernie4_5_VLMoeVisionBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: norm + vision_attn + residual + norm + mlp + residual (vision encoder block)

classes.name: EsmRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: standard RoPE: inv_freq + outer product + cat(freqs,freqs); ModernBERT-style

classes.name: EsmContactPredictionHead
classes.rationale: Linear regression on symmetrized + APC-corrected attention maps

classes.name: EsmEmbeddings
classes.rationale: word + optional position + optional emb_layer_norm + token-dropout (ESM-specific MLM masking compensation). Not standard BertEmbeddings; closest is L2/encoder_embeddings.py but ESM lacks token_type embeddings.

classes.name: EsmSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style separate q/k/v + ALL_ATTENTION_FUNCTIONS dispatch + optional rotary apply (ESM scales query before RoPE rather than scaling logits). Closest kb-nano: encoder_attention.py (separate q/k/v + DenseAttention/FlashAttnVarlen). Caveat: kb-nano encoder_attention.py does not handle RoPE; would need composition with L1/rotary_emb.py.

classes.name: EsmSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout + residual (residual ADDED here, not in ESMLayer)

classes.name: EsmAttention
classes.rationale: wiring class around EsmSelfAttention + EsmSelfOutput; pre-norm (LayerNorm BEFORE self-attention, residual outside)

classes.name: EsmIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + gelu (hardcoded, not config-driven). composes from L1/linear + L1/gelu

classes.name: EsmLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre-norm: attention(LN before) + residual + LayerNorm + intermediate + output. Differs from BERT (BERT is post-norm).

classes.name: EsmModel
classes.rationale: wiring: embeddings + rotary + encoder + optional pooler

classes.name: EsmFoldLinear
classes.rationale: ESMFold variant: nn.Linear with optional zeros/glorot/relu/gating init

classes.name: EsmFoldAttention
classes.rationale: AlphaFold-style attention: separate q/k/v with optional gating + bias addition + softmax + matmul. Closest kb-nano: L1/openfold3_attention.py:OF3Attention (gated attention with bias) -- pattern matches.

classes.name: EsmFoldTriangleAttention
classes.rationale: AF-style triangle attention (starting/ending node); same algorithm as openfold3 TriangleAttention

classes.name: EsmFoldTriangleMultiplicativeUpdate
classes.rationale: AF-style triangle multiplicative update (outgoing/incoming); matches kb-nano TriangleMultiplicativeUpdate

classes.name: EsmFoldSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Multi-head self-attention used in TriangularSelfAttentionBlock (separate q/k/v + gating)

classes.name: EsmFoldSequenceToPair
classes.rationale: outer-product over sequence; closest kb-nano L1/openfold3_outer_product_mean.py for OPM

classes.name: EsmFoldPairToSequence
classes.rationale: LayerNorm + Linear projection of pair to sequence bias

classes.name: EsmFoldResidueMLP
classes.rationale: LayerNorm + Linear + ReLU + Linear residue feature MLP

classes.name: EsmFoldTriangularSelfAttentionBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: SelfAttention + SequenceToPair + PairToSequence + TriangleMul + TriangleAttention + ResidueMLP

classes.name: EsmFoldStructureModuleTransitionLayer
classes.rationale: Linear + ReLU + Linear + Linear residual layer

classes.name: EsmFoldStructureModule
classes.rationale: wiring: IPA + transition + backbone update + angle resnet (per-step iterative refinement)

classes.name: EuroBertAttention
classes.rationale: inherits LlamaAttention but sets is_causal=False (bidirectional). L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention is causal-by-default; the bidirectional behavior would be controlled by the attention backend (encoder mode). Maps to attention.py with caveat: causal mask flipped off.

classes.name: EuroBertForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: wiring: EuroBertModel + classifier (with bos/mean/late pooling options)

classes.name: EvollaSaProtSelfAttention
classes.rationale: ESM-style separate q/k/v + optional rotary; bidirectional

classes.name: EvollaSequenceCompressorAttention
classes.rationale: Perceiver-style cross attention: latents Q + cat(media,latents) KV; manual softmax with masked_fill -1e4. Custom; decompose.

classes.name: EvollaSequenceCompressorResampler
classes.rationale: wiring: ModuleList of (CompressorAttention + FeedForward) + projection + LayerNorm

classes.name: EvollaSequenceAlignerCrossAttention
classes.rationale: Multi-modality cross-attention: query from text, K/V cat across protein/structure/MSA modalities; tanh-gated residual + tanh-gated FFN. Custom; decompose.

classes.name: EvollaDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: Llama decoder layer + optional EvollaSequenceAlignerCrossAttention adapter

classes.name: Exaone4RotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Gemma2 RoPE = standard llama RoPE init; standard

classes.name: Exaone4Attention
classes.rationale: GQA + q_norm/k_norm + sliding-window-pattern (NoPE on global, RoPE on sliding) + ALL_ATTENTION_FUNCTIONS dispatch with sliding_window kwarg. L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention supports qk_norm + sliding_window + nope flags -- close match.

classes.name: Exaone4DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: Olmo2 decoder layer (post-attention/post-feedforward LayerNorm pattern)

classes.name: Exaone4Model
classes.rationale: wiring: embed + decoder layers + final norm

classes.name: Exaone4_5_PatchEmbed
classes.rationale: Conv3d patch embedding for vision (Qwen-VL pattern)

classes.name: Exaone4_5_VisionAttention
classes.rationale: Qwen2.5-VL vision attention with fused QKV (q_dim + 2*kv_dim) + 2D vision RoPE + flash_attn_varlen with cu_seqlens. L2/vision_attention.py implements this pattern (overridden q/k/v split for GQA in Exaone variant).

classes.name: Exaone4_5_VisionBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: norm + vision_attn + residual + norm + mlp + residual

classes.name: ExaoneMoeAttention
classes.rationale: inherits Exaone4Attention; GQA + q/k_norm + sliding-window pattern

classes.name: ExaoneMoeTopkRouter
classes.rationale: DeepseekV3-style grouped sigmoid+top-k routing with correction bias

classes.name: ExaoneMoeExperts
classes.rationale: Naive (non-fused) MoE expert dispatch loop. Closest kb-nano: L2/fused_experts.py for the fused variant; the naive loop is per-expert SwiGLU compute.

classes.name: ExaoneMoeSparseMoEBlock
classes.rationale: DeepseekV3-style MoE block with shared experts. L2/deepseek_moe.py matches (grouped routing + shared expert + routed experts + routed_scaling_factor).

classes.name: ExaoneMoeDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: Olmoe decoder layer with sparse/dense MLP per layer_idx

classes.name: ExaoneMoeModel
classes.rationale: wiring: embed + decoder layers + final norm

classes.name: FalconLinear
classes.rationale: nn.Linear subclass with custom reset_parameters; same compute kernel

classes.name: FalconAttention
classes.rationale: Fused QKV (multi-query OR new-decoder GQA) + optional ALiBi or RoPE + optional bias. NOT a clean LlamaAttention match: ALiBi path uses additive bias to logits (not in kb-nano L2/attention.py which assumes RoPE/no-pos), multi_query has special K/V broadcast. Decompose from L1/linear + L1/rotary_emb + L1/sdpa (or flash_attn_decode/varlen for non-alibi paths).

classes.name: FalconFlashAttention2
classes.rationale: FlashAttention2 forward override of FalconAttention; same parameters but uses _flash_attention_forward. Decompose.

classes.name: FalconMLP
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT2FN + Linear (two-layer FFN, no SwiGLU). NOT SwiGLU; closest kb-nano L2/encoder_mlp.py uses GELU (Falcon's default activation is also gelu). Decompose from L1/linear + L1/gelu.

classes.name: FalconDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: parallel-attention or sequential layout with input_layernorm + self_attention + mlp + dropout_add residual. Falcon-specific config (parallel_attn, num_ln_in_parallel_attn) controls layout.

classes.name: FalconModel
classes.rationale: wiring: word embeddings + decoder layers + final layernorm + ALiBi build

classes.name: FalconH1Attention
classes.rationale: LlamaAttention with extra key_multiplier scaling on K. Forward overridden but otherwise standard. L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention does not natively support a per-K multiplier; would need post-hoc scaling. Mark as attention.py with caveat.

classes.name: FalconH1RMSNormGated
classes.rationale: RMSNormGated with grouped variance + optional norm_before_gate. L1/rms_norm_gated.py implements gated RMS norm; close match.

classes.name: FalconH1Mixer
classes.rationale: Mamba2 SSD mixer (with mamba_d_ssm option + optional rms_norm_gated). L2/mamba2_mixer.py implements bit-identical mamba2 forward.

classes.name: FalconH1DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: hybrid Mamba2+Llama decoder layer (mamba mixer + attention + mlp variants per layer_idx)

classes.name: FalconH1Model
classes.rationale: wiring: embed + decoder layers + final rms norm

classes.name: FalconMambaMixer
classes.rationale: Mamba1 mixer with extra RMSNorm on B/C/dt (b_c_rms, dt_rms buffers). L2/mamba_mixer.py implements Mamba1 selective_scan + causal_conv1d; the b/c/dt RMSnorm is a FalconMamba-specific extension on top of the same base.

classes.name: FalconMambaRMSNorm
classes.rationale: standard rms norm (Mamba1 variant uses same algorithm)

classes.name: FalconMambaModel
classes.rationale: wiring: embed + mamba blocks + final norm
